insight_summary: More people are talking about English Vs Mexico right now. Lead with a clear opinion before the conversation gets crowded.

next_post.hook: Everyone says English Vs Mexico is fading — I think they are reading it wrong.
next_post.content_idea: Frame it around what people really think about english vs mexico right now — use one real example from daily British life, then ask viewers which side they are on.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into curiosity, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.
